title: Explodify
description:
Explode any mob :3
(use flint and steel to make a mob instable or ice to stabilize the mob)
body:
Use flint and steel to destabilize any entity (and they grow a bit), if an entity becomes too unstable it explodes.

With any type of ice you can stabilize an entity (and shrink them)

Try using the /tick freeze command to make an entity more unstable than he is supposed to be ;)
